title: Flynn Motor replication 3 - generating electricity
description: I used the miniature flynn motor i made and rewound the coils with some hair thin wire i got from an old shaded pole motor coil and mounted it on a circuit board. The switching coils are wired in parallel and the collection coils are wired in series - Pulsing the switching coils with 12v does generate a current on the collecting coils but only about 100-150mV - I'm ok with that as it does seem to show the concept is sound if not an over unity device. This motor is pretty ad hoc - so it seems a better more controlled build is in order and i think that's what I'll be doing next.
